factors.org_discoverability: medium — mix of academic and commercial sources
factors.biomarker_specificity: very high — ER negative, PR negative not indexed in registry, needs retrospective testing

expected_failure_modes: May not find commercial biobanks (ProteoGenex, BIOMEDICA CRO, Medical Gate) through PubMed — they publish less than academic centers
May overestimate ER negative/PR negative availability if system infers 'standard practice' instead of checking
Matched pair discovery requires cross-referencing donor IDs — hard without registry access
Treatment-naive filtering depends on parsing free-text treatment fields — may miss nuance
May find valid sources NOT in AminoChain (academic cohorts, biobanks) — these are correct finds, just unverifiable against this ground truth
